description: In a casual slip-on style with absolute visual appeal, the Diameter-Jadon III from skechers makes for a perfect addition to the casual wardrobe. The smooth leather upper and stitch detailing gives it a rugged look, making it a fab buy. Upper Smooth oiled leather upper with scuff resistant leather and waxed canvas overlays Slip-on style for ease of wear Concealed elastic gores on the sides of the tongue to offer a customised Fit Relaxed Step footbed for all-day ergonomically padded comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with strategically placed multi-directional lugs throughout for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
